spec.objective: Batch 01 parent: baseline neoforge-mixin-v1 validation for five core FramedBlocks mixin classes on branch 26.1
constraints: Decompose into one child task per mixin file
Preserve @Mixin target mappings and framedblocks.mixin.json registration
acceptance_criteria: All five child tasks created with parent_id linking to this task
Each child task accepted through neoforge-mixin-v1 gate
Gradle compileJava succeeds in each workload worktree
